findings.title: invariants.ts runCommand() accumulates output without byte cap — OOM risk on large semgrep scans
findings.detail: InvariantRunner.runCommand() pushes all stdout/stderr chunks into an unbounded array with no size limit. A large semgrep scan against a big codebase will accumulate the full output in memory before the process exits. sandbox.ts has a matching runCommand() that caps at 1MB and appends '[output truncated]' — invariants.ts must mirror that guard to prevent the long-running daemon from OOM-crashing on pathological scans.
findings.fix_sketch: Add totalBytes counter and cap = 1_000_000 sentinel matching sandbox.ts lines 419-432. In onData: skip push once cap is reached; append '[output truncated]' in the close handler when truncated is true.

findings.title: scorer.ts maybeEmbedSprint() uses void cfg; dead expression to suppress unused-parameter lint warning
findings.detail: The cfg parameter in the private maybeEmbedSprint() function is declared for future use (cfg.embeddingModel) but is currently unused. Rather than the idiomatic TypeScript convention of prefixing unused parameters with '_', the code uses a void cfg; no-op statement. Renaming the parameter to _cfg and removing the void statement is cleaner and more immediately communicative.
findings.fix_sketch: In maybeEmbedSprint(), rename parameter cfg: ProposerConfig to _cfg: ProposerConfig and remove the void cfg; statement. Update the comment to reference _cfg.

findings.title: budget.ts enforceBudget declared async but contains no await — misleading signature
findings.detail: enforceBudget() is declared as an async function but the body contains no await expression — it filters, sorts, and slices synchronously. The async keyword adds an implicit Promise wrapper and makes the function appear to do I/O or deferred work. Removing async would require updating the ProposerStages interface return type in index.ts (currently Promise<DedupedCandidate[]>); noted here for completeness but deferred to avoid cross-file cascade.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove async from enforceBudget, change return type to DedupedCandidate[], and update the enforceBudget? field in ProposerStages interface in index.ts to match. All callers await it so behaviour is identical.
